units.name: Infantry
units.description: This basic unit of the Hume is inferior in combat, but consumes little mana.

units.name: Panzer
units.description: This ironclad soldier moves very slowly, but provides high Defense, an advantage over lightweight horsemen units like Cavalry and Scouts.

units.name: Cavalry
units.description: This unit has fast Movement and Attack Speeds, making it ideal to deal with low-defense units or to raid the enemy tower.

units.name: Hunter
units.description: Specialized in aerial and long-ranged attacks. It is inferior in close quarters combat due to its low HP .

units.name: Gliders
units.description: Throws javelins from the air. Use it to attack the enemy's infantry units without risk, or to destroy the enemy tower without interference.

units.name: Thief
units.description: This unit steals mana from the enemy with each attack, but must be kept safely from melee attacks due to its inferior combat capabilities.

units.name: Shielder
units.description: This highly defensive unit pushes the enemy backward with each attack. Create a barricade with several of these to keep your tower impenetrable.

units.name: Spearman
units.description: This unit attacks multiple enemies and pushes them backward. It is stronger in groups than when alone.

units.name: Rider
units.description: This advanced Cavalry provides a higher Movement Speed and enhanced combat capabilities.

units.name: Artillery
units.description: Shoots cannons to attack multiple enemies from a distance. This powerful shooter is effective against Shielders, Goblins, and Siege Golems, but vulnerable to melee attacks.

units.name: Bomber
units.description: This aerial unit bombards the enemy on the ground  but it is a sitting duck for aerial enemies, for it does not have an aerial attack.

units.name: Interceptor
units.description: This unit is the best at midair dogfights. Use it to shoot down Bombers, Queen Bees, and Wyvern Riders.

units.name: Medic
units.description: This healer unit ensures maximum defense when used in combination with Shielders and Infantry Officers.

units.name: Gun Cavalry
units.description: This horseback gunslinger is effective against defensive units. it also has a high survival rate as it automatically moves backward after each attack.

units.name: Infantry Officer
units.description: This unit is the best heavy infantryman of the Hume, providing Defense equal to that of the Shielder, along with high HP and reliable Attack Strength.

units.name: Battleship
units.description: This Hume flying fortress is excellent in both air-to-ground and anti-personnel attacks, and its bullets push enemies backward.

units.name: Knoll
units.description: The Knoll is very weak, but consumes the least amount of mana among all the units and races with a short Spawn Delay. Use it in large numbers in the beginning of a stage to overwhelm the enemy.

units.name: Minota
units.description: Moves slowly and consumes more mana than the Knoll, but makes up for it with its high Attack Strength.

units.name: Bunny
units.description: This unit inflicts damage on multiple enemies . It is stronger in groups than when alone.

units.name: Short hair
units.description: This unit moves and attacks at an extremely high speed. It is effective against the enemy's basic units, but inferior to heavy infantrymen.

units.name: Pigling
units.description: Charges at multiple enemies to inflict damage  and push them backward with its tusks. It is almost invincible when in groups.

units.name: Foxbow
units.description: This archer unit  is one of a few units of the Busters that are capable of aerial attacks.

units.name: Goblin
units.description: This unit self-destructs near enemies. Despite of its massive Attack Strength, you should use it only when many enemies are near, as it perishes after just one attack.

units.name: Big Hippo
units.description: A well-rounded unit with high HP, Defense, and a fast speed. Use it to keep the enemy at bay.

units.name: Harpy
units.description: This unit flies around and shoot arrow-like feathers.  Damange isn't too impressive, however.

units.name: Werewolf
units.description: This unit is the fastest among the normal units, use it to raid the enemy. It is inferior to heavy infantrymen like Infantry Officers and Siege Golems .

units.name: Rhino
units.description: This unit charges at multiple enemies to inflict great damage  and push them far away.

units.name: Salamander
units.description: This unit breathes fire to attack multiple enemies.  Use it to instantly finish a group of low-defense units.

units.name: Cyclops
units.description: Throws rocks at enemies from afar. This unit is effective against defensive units.

units.name: Queen Bee
units.description: This aerial unit delivers a kamikaze attack on the enemy hero upon detection, while fighting aerial and infantry units.

units.name: Shaman
units.description: This non-combat unit uses black magic to immobilize the enemy and turn their Defense into 0. It is especially effective against the enemy with only a small group  of advanced units.

units.name: Behemoth
units.description: Fists down the enemy and inflicts substantial damage.  It moves quickly, but its Attack Speed is slow; not an ideal unit against multiple enemies.

units.name: Slinger
units.description: This basic unit of the Elven delivers slingshot attacks. It has higher stats than the other basic units, but it consumes more mana to spawn.

units.name: Dendroid
units.description: Moves slowly, but provides high Defense. Use it to protect your Slingers, Arbalests, and Phalanxes.

units.name: Scout
units.description: This basic Elven horseman moves quickly to attack the enemy. It is stronger than the same unit of the other races, but it consumes more mana to spawn.

units.name: Arbalest
units.description: Shoots arrows at multiple enemies from afar. It is effective against defensive units like Panzers.

units.name: Phalanx
units.description: This elite Elven spearman inflicts damage on enemies within its range. While it is strong in groups, it is vulnerable to melee attacks.

units.name: Witch
units.description: Rides a broom and attacks the enemy from the air.  It moves quickly, but its Defense is low.

units.name: Swordmaster
units.description: Inflicts great damage at a high speed.  This skilled swordsman consumes a considerably high amount of MP.

units.name: Triali
units.description: This seasoned elite Phalanx  pushes multiple enemies backward with great damage.

units.name: Caster
units.description: Thhis unit uses curse spells to attack the enemy's long-ranged and support units.  Use it to counter Medics, Shamans, Bishops, and Artillery.

units.name: Griffin Rider
units.description: This interceptor unit uses its sharp talons to attack aerial units. Having high HP, it can also act as a shield against aerial attacks.

units.name: Siege Golem
units.description: This unit moves very slowly, but its Defense is so high  that it can endure almost all attacks from lesser offensive units.

units.name: Templar
units.description: This most elite heavy infantryman of the Elven provides outstanding Attack Strength and Defense at the cost of a great amount of mana.

units.name: Sagi
units.description: This ace archer of the Elven shoots powerful arrows from a very long distance, and it is effective against aerial and defensive units.

units.name: Archmage
units.description: This destructive unit can annihilate surrounding enemies with meteor attacks, but is vulnerable to melee attacks.

units.name: Wyvern Rider
units.description: This unit bombards infantry units  from the air. Its air-to-ground Attack Strength is comparable to the Hume Battleship, if not better.

units.name: Bishop
units.description: This unit casts buffs and restores HP for its friendly force. Team it up with advanced units for maximum performance.

units.name: Neive
units.description: An advanced Battleship.

units.name: Martin
units.description: This ultimate spearman with well-rounded attack and defense capabilities even has the ability to push the enemy backward.

units.name: Rose
units.description: This support unit can handle midair battles by itself for the Buster camp that has only a few aerial units.

units.name: Arang
units.description: This unit, being faster than Werewolf, can raid the enemy almost instantly,  but it is somewhat ineffective against defensive units.

units.name: Lantere
units.description: This unit is specialized in powerful double blows, and compensates the weakness of the Elven in melee combat with its high HP and adequate Defense.

units.name: Theon
units.description: Shoots lightning to attack multiple enemies, and especially good at finishing low-leveled units.
None

findings: Phase-4 canonical schema now fixes XlsUnit, XlsHero, XlsHero_Ai, XlsSkill_Ai, XlsProjectile, XlsEffect, XlsParticle, and XlsBalance into one engine-input export.
Each section preserves the parsed raw slots while adding stable engineHints fields for runtime consumption.
XlsParticle rows are enriched with PTC bridge data from AW1.effect_runtime_links.json so particle records no longer remain detached from runtime assets.
Battle-model generation can now depend on this schema instead of reading those GXL-derived tables indirectly.
